---
title: "08. 行军、观兆与局部观测"
subtitle: "Marching, Field Signs, and Local Observation"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 8
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 行军 reads dust, birds, silence, and movement traces as partial observables from which hidden military state must be inferred."
---

**Chapters:** 行军第九  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `rate-distortion information theory`, `fiber structure`

{{< include articles/category_08_marching_field_signs_local_observation.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
